name: Bottenplan (entréplan)

source.drawing: Robertshöjd, Göteborg — Block 26-29, hustyp BAS, ritn nr 102, skala 1:50, 1960

fixtures.label: köksbänk längs östra väggen: ho, spis, diskmaskin/tvättmaskin

assumptions: CURRENT STATE differs from 1960 drawing: both the sovrum/vardagsrum divider and the wall between the north band and trapprum have been torn down (per owner, 2026) — the living room, former bedroom and stair hall form one open space.
Exterior walls uniformly 20 cm (drawing: tegel/betong, party walls east+west, 'extra ljudisol' west).
No windows in east/west walls: row house (block 26-29), both long sides are party walls.

North wall openings per top chain 58+144+51+300+73=626: F3H window 144 (x 58-202, sill 50), 51 cm post, F1H band 300 (x 253-553) modelled as 90 cm glazed terrace door + 210 cm floor-to-head glass. FB1 195/388,5 on the drawing are NOT window widths (fönsterbänk/band figures).

Hall–kök wall slant per drawing: foot at x=292 (YDIV 188+94 plus the '10' mark) to x=261 at the kök north wall. D2H door 80 wide, ~75 cm from the wall's north end. Clear sightline from the entrance north into trapprum/vardagsrum.
Kitchen north storage wall (ST/SKÅP/KOMB-KYL row) modelled as one 30 cm thick wall with a doorless 80 cm passage at its east end.

No wall between hall and trapprum: contiguous floor (dashed lines on drawing are zone suggestions). Solid elements: toilett north wall, and the garderobsvagg (x 137-188, y 20-159, level with the toilett wall face) — a full-height 51 cm wall with the G/G/EL units embedded, door fronts facing the hall (confirmed by owner photo).

Kök dimensions re-read from printed chains (right chain 530/7/373): the 345 chain includes the 35 murstock, so the slant junction is at x 606-345=261; north wall x 261-606 (345, t7, y 376.5) with the murstock block on its last 35, kök interior depth 353, D2V opening 80 at x 425-505, 66 cm wall segment east of it.
Kitchen counter run (ho, spis, diskmaskin/tvättmaskin) along the EAST exterior wall; tall units (ST/SKÅP/KOMB-KYL: skafferi, kyl/frys) stand in front of the kök north wall (owner photos).
Murstock at the east wall north of the kök wall segment, with the öppen spis attached at 45° facing the living room, modelled as a 145 cm high angled solid (owner photo).
North window band heights per owner photos: west band sill 50, east band glazed to the floor.
Toilett door is in its north wall (east half), opening toward trapprum; east wall is solid (backs the G/G/EL units).
Stair zone opens to vardagsrum without a wall (dashed boundary on drawing).
Spiral stair: half-revolution semicircle hugging the west wall, centre (117, 402), r 95 — extents y 307-497 (bottom just above the D2H door top, top at the fireplace line), per owner + drawing.
Ceiling height not on plan drawing; 240 cm per owner (confirmed, both floors).
Window sill/head heights assumed: 90/210 standard, living room band 50/220, doors 210.
Murstock position estimated from 'gipsskiva klistras å grovstockn' note and överplan chimney hatch.
